title: Dispatch
description: Validates a dispatch artifact — the grounded story candidates mined from the corpus. Produced by report; consumed by edit, write, and factcheck.

issue_id.description: The issue these candidates are for.

candidates.description: The grounded story candidates mined from the corpus.

candidate_id.description: Stable identifier, referenced by lineup, draft, and the issue coverage report.

headline.description: Provisional headline — what the development is.

summary.description: What happened — the development in brief.

source_trail.description: The records supporting this candidate. Grounding begins here — a candidate with no source trail is invalid.

thread_id.description: If this candidate continues an inherited thread, the thread's id.

excerpt_or_detail.description: The specific content in that record that supports the candidate.
